reviews.comment:
La verdad un lugar lindo pero muy lento todo los baños bastante sucios pero entiendo que había mucha gente y habia mezcla de olores queso,salame ,baño ETC pero igual y muy pero muy buen lugar recomendable los mantecados.en conclusión todo muy bien(casi) falta pulir algunas cosas pero bueno Saludos.

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, it's a nice place, but very slow. The bathrooms were quite dirty, but I understand there were a lot of people and a mix of smells: cheese, salami, bathroom, etc. Still, it's a very, very good place; I recommend the shortbread cookies. In conclusion, everything was very good (almost). A few things need polishing, but oh well. Cheers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkMVphWjVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre lleno la parte gastro, recomendable en lugar, precio, gente y morfi por estar en ruta e incluso creo que lugareños de buen pasar son clientes, abajo del puente del lado hacia Capital

(Translated by Google)
The food court is always packed; it's highly recommended for its location, price, people, and food, especially since it's on the road. I even think some well-off locals are customers, located under the bridge on the side heading towards the capital.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkcGJ2VU13EAE
